original_image_tags: A small, handwritten numeral "4" in red pencil is centered at the bottom margin of the page.

elements.description: Page consists entirely of typed text, including a handwritten signature and a red handwritten 'X' mark crossing out a name. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Description A claims a red handwritten numeral '4' is visually present, while Description B claims the page consists entirely of typed text with no visual content, indicating a direct contradiction on the presence of a key visual element.
